text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Whoa! …Ooh, my legs are feeling the burn.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sigh… Oguri's unstoppable… How can she dash straight to the cafeteria like that after running long-distance?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wait… yeah, chin up, Chiyono O! 
"Spring comes again for winter flower buds"!
Flowers that bear the winter will live to 
blossom in spring!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Right! I'm gonna take it easy and use the day
to do some thorough stretches and reflection!
Never give up, Chiyono O!
